case_title: MANUEL MORALES VS. MICHELLE L PEDEMONTE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NONE GIVEN) SERVED MAR-28-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PEDEMONTE, MICHELLE L
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $725.00 FILED BY MORALES, MANUEL AS TO DEFENDANT PEDEMONTE, MICHELLE L ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT AND ASKED DEFENDANT IF SHE WANTED TO SETTLE THE CASE, SHE DID NOT AGREE, THEN HE SAID THAT HE IS GOING TO LABOR COMMISSION TO RESOLVE THE CASE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO:PLAINTIFF - MORALES, MANUEL
